LanguageData.VoidDeleter_ToggleDesc: Enable or disable the Void Deleter. When disabled it will not process any designations even if powered.
LanguageData.VoidDeleter_SelectAreaDesc: Choose which area this Void Deleter monitors for deconstruction and mining designations (current: {0}).
LanguageData.VoidDeleter_OutputModeDesc: Toggle where products are placed after deconstruction or mining. Current mode: {0}. Click to switch.
